title: This Order Block Setup Paid 3X in One Week (April 2026)
description: Stop guessing entries. This one order block + fair value gap combo is the exact setup smart money traders are using right now. Watch how the R2F Trading system breaks it down — setup, entry, result. Follow r2ftrading.com for daily ICT breakdowns.
script: Stop. Before your next trade — check this one thing. Most funded traders fail because they skip it. It's sitting right on the chart. And once you see it, you can't unsee it. DXY swept buyside liquidity — then dropped straight into a bearish order block. A fair value gap formed right inside it. Price sat there for 11 hours. That's not random. That's smart money loading up. The entry was at the top of the fair value gap. Stop above the order block. Target: the next draw on liquidity below. The R2F Trading system calls this a Mitigation Entry. Risk-to-reward? 1 to 3.2. Clean. Calculated. No guessing. That's the R2F Trading system. Order blocks. Fair value gaps. Real edge. Follow R2F Trading — we drop setups like this every single week. Link in bio at r2ftrading.com.
